required_case_evidence: Consumer or end-demand durability must be tested through demand persistence, pull-forward or payer/access evidence.
coverage_standard: At least two cases must expose consumer/end-demand uncertainty and change actionability or downgrade timing.
remaining_gap: Needs true later-event follow-through for consumer-demand refresh proof.
must_refresh_if: Demand persistence, payer access, utilization, adherence, hardware demand or customer economics changes materially.

required_case_evidence: Product reality and monetization must be tested through usage-to-economics bridges, product adoption, or product/segment economics.
coverage_standard: At least two cases must test product evidence and at least one must downgrade product traction to watch-only.
remaining_gap: Needs external reviewer challenge of CRM monetization bridge and stablecoin issuer economics.
must_refresh_if: Product ARR, usage, retention, pricing, unit economics, segment margin or paid adoption changes materially.

required_case_evidence: Macro or capital-cycle transmission must be tested where rates, budgets, power demand, regulatory economics or capital availability drive value capture.
coverage_standard: At least two macro/economy-linked cases must block generic theme actionability until transmission economics are visible.
remaining_gap: Needs project-specific economics or budget-line archives before external single-equity example use.
must_refresh_if: Rates, AI power demand, defense budget, grid rules, procurement funding or capital-cycle evidence changes materially.

required_case_evidence: Industry structure and value migration must be tested through value-chain position, regulation, contract status, competitive structure or public-company value capture.
case_ids: ETN_2026; VRT_2026; NUCLEAR_AI_POWER_2026; STABLECOIN_PAYMENTS_2026; DEFENSE_AUTONOMY_2026; HUMANOID_ROBOTICS_2026
coverage_standard: At least four cases must test industry/value-chain structure and at least three hot-theme screens must block one-step theme-to-stock conclusions.
remaining_gap: Needs external reviewer challenge of whether screens consistently block narrative value capture.
must_refresh_if: Value-chain economics, competitive structure, regulation, contract status, delivery evidence or value-capture location changes materially.

required_case_evidence: Company execution and capital allocation must be tested through backlog conversion, acquisition value capture, capital allocation, delivery or funded program quality.
coverage_standard: At least three cases must test company execution or capital allocation and identify a stop rule or source gap.
remaining_gap: Needs follow-through refresh after later event to prove execution trigger quality.
must_refresh_if: Backlog conversion, acquisition integration, buyback/debt/cash bridge, delivery, contract quality or execution margin changes materially.

required_case_evidence: Valuation expectations must be tested through expectation maps, valuation burden, consensus/source gaps and what is already priced.
coverage_standard: At least four cases must include valuation expectations as primary or secondary lens and change actionability or downgrade timing.
remaining_gap: G05 is internally cleared but CRM source methodology and historical consensus exceptions remain subject to G06.
must_refresh_if: Forward estimates, FCF source definitions, historical EV/FCF reconstruction, multiple, consensus exception or market-implied expectations change materially.
